fomod.Name: Vivid Routines - Lightweight Living AI
fomod.Author: Karlo
fomod.Description: A modern living-world AI mod: routines for modded followers and idle NPCs, day/night behavior for vampires, werewolves and daedra, citizen wanderlust, jarl flavor, and dynamic visitors for modded venues. One tiny script, zero record edits, zero patches - powered by SPID, SkyPatcher and MCM Helper. Optional modules auto-detect Coldhaven, the Manguz taverns and Beyond Skyrim: Bruma.
